name: Stud Panel Config
description: Create a stud-framed PanelPopulatorConfig.  Opening-specific options (lintel_posts, split_bottom_plate_beam, header_width, ...) live on an OpeningPopulatorAgentConfig that you wire through default_feature_configs or instance_feature_configs.

inputParameters.name: standard_beam_width
inputParameters.description: Default width for every framing beam category not given an explicit width.

inputParameters.name: stud_spacing
inputParameters.description: On-centre stud spacing. None -> 8 x stud_width. 0 -> no studs.

inputParameters.name: stud_width
inputParameters.description: Explicit stud beam width. Falls back to standard_beam_width when omitted.

inputParameters.name: edge_stud_width
inputParameters.description: Width of vertical edge studs. Falls back to standard_beam_width when omitted.

inputParameters.name: top_plate_beam_width
inputParameters.description: Width of top plate beams. Falls back to standard_beam_width when omitted.

inputParameters.name: bottom_plate_beam_width
inputParameters.description: Width of bottom plate beams. Falls back to standard_beam_width when omitted.

inputParameters.name: joint_rule_overrides
inputParameters.description: List of CategoryRule overrides routed automatically to the agent(s) that own each rule's categories (internal vs external is inferred).

inputParameters.name: default_feature_configs
inputParameters.description: List of FeatureAgentConfig instances (one per feature type) registered under their FEATURE_TYPE class. Pass an OpeningPopulatorAgentConfig here to enable lintel_posts / split_bottom_plate_beam / custom header / sill widths.
